overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a vehicle driving through a neon-lit underground tunnel. The camera primarily follows the car from a third-person perspective, briefly transitioning to a first-person interior view before returning to the exterior follow-cam. The environment features industrial architecture with vibrant blue and red neon lighting, graffiti-covered walls, and sparse traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underground vehicular tunnel with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: driving through the tunnel following a lead vehicle at moderate speed

notable_agents.action: lead vehicle maintaining steady speed ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with glass skylight sections and ventilation grates
continuous blue neon tubes running along the right tunnel wall
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and industrial markings
blue industrial metal wall with vertical slats and signage
futuristic sedan with glowing red taillights driving ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a vehicle through a cyberpunk-style underground tunnel. Blue neon lights illuminate the right wall while graffiti covers the left. The camera maintains a steady following position behind the lead vehicle as they drive along the multi-lane asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle interior cockpit with dashboard view

events.description: camera moves from third-person exterior through the rear windshield into first-person interior view
camera begins moving back out from interior to third-person exterior perspective

agents.ego_description: driving from first-person perspective with hands visible on the steering wheel, maintaining speed through the tunnel

notable_agents.action: lead vehicle visible through windshield continuing down the tunnel

entered.detail: futuristic dashboard with illuminated controls and digital displays
steering wheel with driver's hands gripping it
silhouette of the driver visible in the left seat
rear window showing the tunnel receding behind

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts dramatically as the camera moves through the rear window into the car's interior. From the driver's seat view, the dashboard and steering wheel frame the windshield showing the tunnel ahead. The blue neon lights cast reflections across the interior surfaces before the camera transitions back toward the exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underground vehicular tunnel approaching exit

events.description: vehicle in opposing lane passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive through the tunnel following the lead vehicle, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: oncoming vehicle passing in the opposite direction lane

segments.scene_description: Returning to the third-person exterior view, the camera resumes following the vehicle from behind as it continues through the neon-lit tunnel. An oncoming car passes in the opposite lane, and the lead vehicle ahead maintains its position as the tunnel stretches toward a distant exit point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit underground tunnel that shifts from an external chase perspective to an intimate interior view and back again. It begins behind a vehicle on a multi-lane asphalt road, where blue neon lights on the right wall contrast with graffiti-covered surfaces on the left. As the car speeds forward, the camera glides seamlessly through the rear window into the cockpit, framing the dashboard and steering wheel while blue reflections shimmer across the interior surfaces. The perspective then transitions back through the glass to the third-person exterior, resuming its steady follow position. Finally, the scene opens up as an oncoming car passes in the opposite lane while the lead vehicle continues toward a distant exit point.
